content:
# Reservoir Quality

**Summary**: Broad research theme addressed in the thesis collection.

---

## How It Appears in the Thesis Collection

- [[2002-siddiqui|Siddiqui, 2002]] contributed to the theme of Reservoir Quality

- [[2021-al-nuwais|Al-Nuwais, 2021]] evaluated reservoir quality using RQI and heterogeneity indices.

- [[2021-alqarni|Alqarni, 2021]] evaluated the factors controlling the reservoir quality of glacially related rocks.

- [[2023-butt|Butt, 2023]] evaluated reservoir quality in the Al Wajh Formation based on depositional and diagenetic factors.

- [[2024-suleiman-2|Suleiman, 2024]] evaluated the reservoir quality for gas storage in carbonate and sandstone.

## Key Subtopics



- [[2021-al-nuwais|Al-Nuwais, 2021]] evaluated reservoir quality using RQI and heterogeneity indices.

- [[2021-alqarni|Alqarni, 2021]] evaluated the factors controlling the reservoir quality of glacially related rocks.

- [[2023-butt|Butt, 2023]] evaluated reservoir quality in the Al Wajh Formation based on depositional and diagenetic factors.

- [[2024-suleiman-2|Suleiman, 2024]] evaluated the reservoir quality for gas storage in carbonate and sandstone.

## Methods and Approaches Used



## Key Findings Across Sources

- contributed to the theme of Reservoir Quality ([[2002-siddiqui|Siddiqui, 2002]])

- The Reservoir Quality Index was between 0.011 and 1.208. ([[2021-al-nuwais|Al-Nuwais, 2021, p. 13]])

- Quality is impacted by grain size distribution, packing, and cementation (silica/calcite). ([[2021-alqarni|Alqarni, 2021, p. 20]])

- Braided fluvial fan sandstones showed superior quality (23.2% porosity; 3025 mD permeability) compared to nearshore units. ([[2023-butt|Butt, 2023, p. 134]])

- Carbonate rocks were affected more by oleic acid than sandstone rock regarding wettibility changes. ([[2024-suleiman-2|Suleiman, 2024, p. 50]])
